name: linacre-toolbox
title: Linacre Tool Box
description: Privacy-first developer utilities from linacre.site, exposed as Model Context Protocol tools. Pure, offline, deterministic — nothing you pass in leaves your machine.

tools.name: jwt_decode
tools.description: Decode a JWT header + payload (no signature verification).

tools.name: regex_test
tools.description: Test a JS regex against text; returns matches, indices, named groups.

tools.name: hash
tools.description: sha256 / sha1 / sha512 / md5 of input text.

tools.name: password_generate
tools.description: CSPRNG password with configurable character classes.

tools.name: url_clean
tools.description: Remove utm_*, fbclid, gclid and 25+ tracking parameters from a URL.

tools.name: timestamp_convert
tools.description: Convert Unix timestamps to ISO/UTC and back.

tools.name: text_tools
tools.description: stats, case changes, trim, dedupe/sort/reverse lines, slugify.
